== mapped shell ==
G0449 -> S0001 | greeting='hello'
             <= let greeting = "hello"
G0450 -> S0002 | if {
             <= if true {
G0451 -> S0002 | [ 'true' = 'true' ]
             <= if true {
G0452 -> S0002 | }; then
             <= if true {
G0453 -> S0003 |   printf '%s\n' "${greeting}"
             <=   print greeting
G0454 -> S0002 | fi
             <= if true {
G0455 -> S0005 | printf '%s\n' warn >&2
             <= shell "printf '%s\n' warn >&2"
G0456 -> S0006 | printf '%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "${greeting}" '!')"
             <= print greeting + "!"

== runtime ==
status: 0
stdout:
hello
hello!
stderr:
warn
